entry.title: Customizing PlanningCalendar: Adding Headers & Expandable Rows
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m working with UI5 Tooling and need to customize the PlanningCalendar control to use within an Angular application. Specifically, I want to:

  1. Add extra headers/columns to the table.
  2. Implement expandable rows within the table.

Is it possible to make these customizations using UI5 Tooling, or is it limited to modifying basic UI elements such as buttons? I have reviewed the API reference but have not found a clear approach to achieve these changes.

 

If these customizations are feasible:

  • Can they be implemented using UI5 Tooling, or would another approach (such as the UI5 SDK) be more appropriate?
  • Should I extend the control or create a custom one for this functionality?
  • Are there any relevant examples or documentation available?

If these options are not suitable, I’d appreciate suggestions on other methods to achieve this.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Duplicate item on binding in SAPUI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am facing issues with my SAPUI5 application; the data is duplicated in the binding. I am using OData v4 created from my CDS. I've created CDS in Eclipse to get Journal Entry Items based on G/l Line Items. I'm using I_GLAccountLineItem and I_JournalEntryItem to get the data, below is my CDS code:

### CDS in Eclipse

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZGLITEMS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'General Ledger Line Items'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view ZGL_LINE_ITEMS
as select distinct from I_GLAccountLineItem as GlLineItem

association [0..1] to I_JournalEntryItem as _toJournalEntryItem
on GlLineItem.AccountingDocument = _toJournalEntryItem.AccountingDocument
and GlLineItem.FiscalYear = _toJournalEntryItem.FiscalYear
and GlLineItem.Ledger = _toJournalEntryItem.Ledger
and GlLineItem.GLAccount <> _toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount
and GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode <> _toJournalEntryItem.DebitCreditCode

association [0..1] to I_User as _toUser
on GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser = _toUser.UserID

{
key GlLineItem.CompanyCode as CompanyCode,
key GlLineItem.AccountingDocument as AccDoc,
GlLineItem.PostingDate as PostingDate,
GlLineItem.FiscalPeriod as Period,
GlLineItem.FiscalYear as FisYear,
GlLineItem.Ledger as Ledger,
GlLineItem.GLAccount as GlAccount,
GlLineItem.DocumentItemText as Description,
_toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount as OpposingGLAccount,
GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode as DebitCreditCode,
GlLineItem.CompanyCodeCurrency as Currency,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
GlLineItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency as AmountInGlLineItem,

// Summing amounts for the GL account
@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
sum(_toJournalEntryItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency) as AmountInJournalEntry,

GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser as CreatedBy,
_toUser.UserDescription as CreatedByDesc,

// Associations
_toJournalEntryItem,
_toUser
}
where
GlLineItem.Ledger = '0L'
group by
GlLineItem.CompanyCode,
GlLineItem.AccountingDocument,
GlLineItem.PostingDate,
GlLineItem.FiscalPeriod,
GlLineItem.FiscalYear,
GlLineItem.Ledger,
GlLineItem.GLAccount,
GlLineItem.DocumentItemText,
_toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount,
GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode,
GlLineItem.CompanyCodeCurrency,
GlLineItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,
GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser,
_toUser.UserDescription;

### Main.view.xml

<mvc:View controllerName="laporankas.laporankas.controller.Main"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:uxap="sap.uxap"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    height="100%">
    <uxap:ObjectPageLayout
        id="idObjectPageLayout"
        showHeaderContent="true"
        toggleHeaderOnTitleClick="true"
        upperCaseAnchorBar="false"
        showFooter="true">
        <uxap:headerTitle>
            <uxap:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle id="idObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle">
                <uxap:expandedHeading>
                    <Title text="Laporan Kas" wrapping="true" />
                </uxap:expandedHeading>
                <uxap:snappedHeading>
                    <Title text="Laporan Kas" wrapping="true" />
                </uxap:snappedHeading>
                <uxap:expandedContent>
                    <Text text="{glRange>/glAccountFrom} - {glRange>/glAccountTo}" />
                </uxap:expandedContent>
                <uxap:snappedContent>
                    <Text text="{glRange>/glAccountFrom} - {glRange>/glAccountTo}" />
                </uxap:snappedContent>
            </uxap:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
        </uxap:headerTitle>
        <uxap:headerContent>
            <HBox alignItems="End">
                <VBox>
                    <Label text="G/L Account" />
                    <ComboBox
                        id="idGlDataSetComboBox"
                        items="{glModel>/glDataSet}"
                        selectionChange="onGlDataSetComboBoxSelectionChange"
                        placeholder="Select GL Account">
                        <core:Item key="{glModel>gl}" text="{glModel>gl}" />
                    </ComboBox>
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Label text="Posting Date" />
                    <DateRangeSelection change="onDateRangeSelectionChange" />
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Label text="Created By" />
                    <ComboBox
                        id="idUserDataSetComboBox"
                        items="{userModel>/userDataSet}"
                        selectionChange="onUserDataSetComboBoxSelectionChange"
                        placeholder="Select Created By">
                        <core:Item key="{userModel>user}" text="{userModel>user}" />
                    </ComboBox>
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Button type="Emphasized" text="Go" press="onGoButtonPress" />
                </VBox>
            </HBox>
        </uxap:headerContent>
        <uxap:sections>
            <uxap:ObjectPageSection
                showTitle="false"
                class="sapUiLargeMarginTopBottom">
                <uxap:subSections>
                    <uxap:ObjectPageSubSection>
                        <VBox>
                            <Table
                                sticky="ColumnHeaders"
                                id="idZglLineItemsTable"
                                items="{
                                    path: '/ZGL_LINE_ITEMS',
                                    filters: [
                                        {
                                            path: 'CreatedBy',
                                            operator: 'NE',
                                            value1: 'SAP_SYSTEM'
                                        },
                                        {
                                            path: 'GlAccount',
                                            operator: 'EQ',
                                            value1: '10010000'
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    sorter: {
                                        path: 'PostingDate',
                                        descending: true
                                    }
                                }"
                                growing="true"
                                growingThreshold="200"
                                alternateRowColors="true"
                                growingTriggerText="Load More"
                                noDataText="No data found"
                                mode="SingleSelectMaster"
                                updateFinished="onTableUpdateFinished">
                                <columns>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Date" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Journal Entry" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="G/L Acc." />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Description" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Opp. G/L Acc." />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Amount" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="CreatedBy" />
                                    </Column>
                                </columns>
                                <items>
                                    <ColumnListItem>
                                        <cells>
                                            <Text text="{PostingDate}" />
                                            <Text text="{AccDoc}" />
                                            <Text text="{GlAccount}" />
                                            <Text text="{Description}" />
                                            <Text text="{OpposingGLAccount}" />
                                            <Text text="{AmountInJournalEntry}" />
                                            <Text text="{CreatedByDesc}" />
                                        </cells>
                                    </ColumnListItem>
                                </items>
                            </Table>

                        </VBox>
                    </uxap:ObjectPageSubSection>
                </uxap:subSections>
            </uxap:ObjectPageSection>
        </uxap:sections>
        <uxap:footer>
            <OverflowToolbar>
                <ToolbarSpacer />
                <Button
                    type="Emphasized"
                    text="Export PDF"
                    press="onExportPDFButtonPress" />
            </OverflowToolbar>
        </uxap:footer>
    </uxap:ObjectPageLayout>
</mvc:View>

### Main.controller.js

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller',
        'sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel',
        'sap/ui/model/Filter',
        'sap/ui/model/FilterOperator',
    ],
    function (Controller, JSONModel, Filter, FilterOperator, PdfmakeMin, vfs_fonts) {
        'use strict';

        return Controller.extend('laporankas.laporankas.controller.Main', {
            onInit: function () {
                const oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel(); // Get the OData V4 model

                if (!oModel) {
                    console.error('OData V4 Model is not available.');
                    return;
                }

                // Define filters
                const client = this._getClientFromURL();
                const glAccount = client === '080' ? '0010010000' : '0011010020';

                const aFilters = [
                    new Filter('GlAccount', FilterOperator.EQ, glAccount),
                    new Filter('CreatedBy', FilterOperator.NE, 'SAP_SYSTEM'), // Example filter for CompanyCode
                ];

                // Bind the entity set with filters
                const oListBinding = oModel.bindList('/ZGL_LINE_ITEMS', undefined, undefined, aFilters);

                // Fetch filtered data
                oListBinding
                    .requestContexts()
                    .then((aContexts) => {
                        const aData = aContexts.map((oContext) => oContext.getObject());
                        console.log('Filtered Data:', aData); // Log the filtered data to the console
                    })
                    .catch((oError) => {
                        console.error('Error Fetching Data:', oError); // Log any errors
                    });
            },

            _getClientFromURL: function () {
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                return urlParams.get('sap-client') || '080'; // Default client
            }
        });
    },
);


### Example CDS result when I run in Eclipse

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000061012100500000

### The Issue (Result when the data bound in SAPUI5 App)

##### Here is the first result:

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000

##### Here is the second result when I refresh:

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000

### What I've done to solve the issue
- I tried to hit the entity endpoint in the browser/Postman, and I got the correct result as in Eclipse, which makes me a little bit confused.
- I tried to console.log it from the controller, but the result is not correct (duplicated).

Please let me know if there's something wrong with the CDS I created or my configuration in my SAPUI5 App or let me know if there's anything I need to do to solve this issue. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: how to consume ODATA while performing CRUD operation...
entry.content:
Hi. @shrutikah

"Employees" entity set is read-only.
so Create, Update, and Delete operation are not possible,
only Read operation is possible.

For more information, please refer to the link below.
https://services.odata.org/v2/

Additionally,
OData Protocol exists up to V2, V3, and V4.
but SAPUI5 Framework only supports V2 and V4.

I hope for good results!

entry.title: Extending the SAP UI5 Fiori App using Visual Studio Code.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am having a requirement like I need to extend standard app App Id : F2345 .App name :Manage Usage Decisions App. In this standard app I need to add the custome logic. In this app I need to add scanner button and I need to implement scanner logic. when I click on that button I need to scan the QR code. Please provide me the solution  anyone will be appreciated.

entry.title: SMS text notifications are useless
entry.content:
SMS text notifications are useless

BAD USER EXPERIENCE 

the link doesn’t take to the SAP FOR ME case, but to the user settings alert.

entry.title: LINK TO COMMENT - ERROR 403 FORBIDDEN
entry.content:
hello
For the past week, we have been unable to access the flowcharts via the web links intended for commenting. These links load partially and then stop.
 Error 403 Forbidden

entry.title: Intent-based Navigation Parameters
entry.content:
In an Overview Page, I have annotations for Intent-based navigation to another app. Can someone please tell me how to send parameters to the target app?

I've been scouring SAP documentation and everywhere else trying to find out how we're supposed to send parameters, but cannot find anything! Even looking at SAP's standard ovp pages, I can't find any annotation they've used to send specific parameters to target app.

I have a simple table card:

<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="TableCardLI">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="accounting_office"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#AmtDP"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
                <Annotation Term="UI.Identification">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation">
                            <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" String="I2PCheckIn"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Action" String="deeplink"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="navigate"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>

When it navigates to target app, it sends a whole bunch of parameters, except the field that I want to send!

I tried to set "Accept additional parameters" in the target mapping to Ignore, Allowed or Disallowed. It makes no difference.

Can anyone point me to an example or documentation that explains how parameters are sent through intent-based navigation in FE?

Thank you.

entry.title: Bank Integration through API
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are in process of API based Bank Integration where the data will be sent in a JASON file using CPI. We are not clear on:

1. What config we need to do in our system?

2. What program we need to maintain under FBZP> Payment method in Country > Use Classic payment medium programs (RFFO*)

Any other thing we need to consider?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: UI5 Building Blocks: How to enable global variant management?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using sap.fe.macros.Table in a freestyle app (not within the FLP) and have set the parameter variantManagement = "Control". I can save variants locally but not globally so that they are available to other users. I assume this requires creating a database table and implementing specific event handlers. However, I haven't found any relevant events in the API documentation.

The API documentation for sap.fe.macros.Table mentions: "If set with value Control, a variant management control is displayed within the table, and the table is linked to it." How can I access this control to attach the necessary event handlers? Is there any sample code available for this?

entry.title: Extending Fiori Elements App Deployed on SAP BTP using Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to create an adaptation project to extend a Fiori Elements app deployed on SAP BTP CF. However, I'm facing issues with selecting the system during the creation process. 

I'm referring to the official SAP documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/adaptation-project-on-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US  but unfortunately, couldn't get it to work.
 
I have successfully created an adaptation project with the app deployed in ABAP, but I'm stuck with extending an app deployed in BTP. Could someone please guide me on how to configure the system (BTP) in the adaptation project? Specifically:

1. Do I need to create a destination to select the BTP Subaccount?
 
2. If yes, how do I create the destination for CF Subaccount?

Any help or resources on this topic would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: MACRS Depreciation incorrect value
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

Configuration Steps: Tax Depreciation method "MACRS"

I have created the new Dep. key with below :

0014, 001, 001,U05

U05 Multilevel method as per below :

9999 1 0 01 20.0000 0.0000
9999 2 0 01 32.0000 0.0000
9999 3 0 01 19.2000 0.0000
9999 4 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 5 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 99 0 01 5.7600 0.0000

It is working when the Ordinary Dep. start is 1st Apr.

I get the exact results , if my ODep start date is other than year beginning my Dep. rates are incorrect.

i am using , Apr~Mar Fiscal year.

Ex: If my O.Dep start is 1st Oct , system is calculating 20% from Oct ~ Mar 2nd year system is calulating 20% for 6 months & another 6 months with 32%.

I am expecting system should calulate 32% for all 12 months.

Thanks
Santhosh

entry.title: RAP validation works in Preview but not in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hello,

Newbie in RAP. I have created a demo app in a sandbox environment.

There is a very basic validation implemented where a field (Office Space) must start with "FL". This works perfectly well when using the "Preview" functionality from Eclipse. The error message appears and the field is highlighted.

However, after creating a List Report with the standard template from Visual Studio Code, only the generic error appears, not the one related to the field.

Below you can find the definition and implementation:

To be noted that if I remove the %state_area value, the error appears in a popup but the field is still not highlighted.

Without %state_area:

So maybe I misuse the %state_area? I have just used a dummy text "OFFICE_SPACE". Should the values for this field be predefined somewhere?

entry.title: Calling Analytics UI API from SAPUI5 Application on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are currently facing a roadblock while implementing the following scenario:

Scenario:
We are working with SAPUI5 applications running on a Cloud Foundry runtime. Our objective is to call the Analytics UI API exposed by CALM from an application UI service hosted outside the CALM tenant.

Setup Details:
-Trust has been successfully established between the subaccount and the Identity Tenant Service.
-A destination using OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion has been configured in the subaccount hosting the SAPUI5 application.
-Additionally, a trust destination has been set up in the environment.
Issue:
Despite these configurations, when I click the link to access my application on the BTP, I receive a 503 Service Unavailable error when attempting to consume the destination in the SAPUI5 application.

 

Shared Configuration Files:
The mta.yaml configuration (attached screenshot).

 


The xs-app.json configuration (attached screenshot).

 


Could you kindly provide guidance on how to resolve this issue? Are there any additional configurations or steps we might have missed?

Looking forward to your timely support and expert input

entry.title: SAPUI5: Consume destination during local development]
entry.content:
Fellow friends, i'm having trouble using my sapui5 app with a destination while working locally.
When deployed, the app works perfectly, but when i'm in development mode on vscode i have a cors error and can't get to access the data.
Basically, it is a simple destination pointing to a NorthWind oData api, no credentials are needed. So, why am i getting this error?
I have worked in an app that could access the destination locally by setting the full url in the .yml file, but it does not work when i do the same in my app.
Could anyone help me get through this problem?

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/CAP Application
entry.content:
I have IAS (Identity Authentication Service) configured for my application. Currently, I am using the /user-api/currentUser API to fetch user information. While this allows me to retrieve basic details about the logged-in user, I am unable to read the roles and groups assigned to the user in IAS.

I need guidance on how to properly fetch roles and group information from IAS within my UI5/CAP application. Are there additional APIs, configurations, or specific steps required to achieve this functionality? Your help in resolving this issue is appreciated.

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model   SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  SAPUI5

entry.title: SAPUI5 auto refresh binding
entry.content:
Is there any possible way  to check if value  is changing other than using interval?

 

 
            this._intervalId = setInterval(function () {

            var sPath1= `/SalesOrderManage('${sSalesOrderID1}')/SalesOrderType`;
 
             }, 2500); // 5000 milliseconds = 5 seconds
           
        },
code is just small preview but i get data like this  oModel.bindContext(sPath1).requestObject() and i have to refresh the value of data, but i wanna know is there any possible way to get it without interval?

entry.title: Increase "page size" or growing threshold in a responsive table
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Since "select all" checkbox was removed (3233426 - 'Select All' checkbox missing on S/4HANA Applications UI from SAP UI5 Version 1.97 to 1.120) selecting large number of items in Manage Billing Documents app is very cumbersome, the workaround of selecting the first element, press shift and select last element only works once all the elements have been displayed. To do that the user needs to press MORE, time after time until all values are displayed

Is there any way to load all elements at once to select all of them faster? Like adding a parameter to the url or setting growingThreshold through the browser dev tools...

 

Thanks in advance,

Best regards,

entry.title: Consume protected destinations during development
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while developing my SAPUI5 app because I am unable to access the destinations during development mode.

I know there is a plugin that allows running BAS in VS Code, but even after using it, I am still unable to connect to the destination.

So, my question is: What needs to be done to set up a development environment that retrieves real data from the destinations configured for the SAPUI5 app?

entry.title: How to properly hide a custom column in a Fiori Elements app with OData V4?
entry.content:
Dear Fiori experts, I hope you can help me with the problem I'm facing.

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using Flexible Programming Model that we're trying to have as much metadata-driven as possible. OData interface is V4. One of my tasks is to implement a custom column with quite sophisticated set of microchartbars, therefore, I'm doing it on frontend by using CDS as my source of data. No problems so far, I've implemented this custom column in my manifest and custom xml template:

My problem is that its availability has to be dependent of another criterion, such as whether or not a user has some particular authorization. This authorization check is done on backend via custom entity and is exposed as an entity set in my OData V4 service, which I read in the onInit method in my List Page controller extension. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to hide this custom column completely if authority check fails. My best bet so far was to use .setIgnoredFields method in .onBeforeRendering method in my List Page controller extension, but for some reason setIgnoredFields works only with columns that come from backend (Plant, Material, etc.), but it totally ignores if I put there my custom column name, no matter what. In the below example it will hide Plant column entirely, but leaves ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn column.

I tried "ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", "DataField::

ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", etc. - no effect. What am I doing wrong and how to do it properly?

I also tried to use all sorts of expression bindings for "availability" in the manifest, but it seems this property is immune to it...

I appreciate every bit of help.

entry.title: How to customize, enhance or edit the Standard Fiori App?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm new to the Fiori Launchpad.

I recently learned how to set up catalogs, target mappings, groups, and roles in PFCG, and how to display tiles to users on the Launchpad.

Now, I want to customize or enhance the UI of a standard Fiori app, such as adding buttons, changing the style of buttons using CSS and etc. How can I do this? How can I access the source code of the app? I can customize my created custom applications in the repository browser -> BSP Application, but I’m unable to do so with standard Fiori apps, such as Fiori app ID F1705.
